overall.description: Aerial footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a flying vehicle navigating through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The vehicle flies over heavy highway traffic, passes a massive cybernetic statue, and weaves through tight corridors between skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway corridor with heavy traffic below

agents.ego_description: piloting flying vehicle straight over multi-lane highway traffic

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign atop building
dense stream of vehicle headlights and taillights on multi-lane road below
cluster of illuminated advertisements on distant buildings
highway structure with lane markings visible below the flying vehicle

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stabilized aerial view from a flying vehicle cruising over a busy multi-lane highway at night. Dense traffic flows below while neon billboards and the Militech Studios sign illuminate the distant skyline. The vehicle maintains steady altitude above the elevated roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon approach with hotel district

events.description: vehicle begins descending and banking left from highway altitude toward street level
entering dense downtown district with taller buildings surrounding the flight path

agents.ego_description: descending into city canyon toward the hotel district while navigating around buildings

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with Japanese characters and 'TENGU' text
tall structure with vertical 'HOTEL' neon signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends sharply from the highway, banking left into a denser urban canyon. The TENGU hotel sign becomes prominent on the left as the vehicle approaches street level, leaving the highway traffic behind. The environment transitions from open highway to enclosed downtown architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: cybernetic monument plaza with tight aerial corridors

events.description: massive cybernetic statue with multiple arms and glowing purple eyes comes into view ahead
banking sharply around the cybernetic statue structure

agents.ego_description: maneuvering around the massive cybernetic statue in the city center

entered.detail: massive multi-armed cybernetic figure with glowing purple eyes and metallic finish

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a massive cybernetic statue dominating the city plaza, its multiple arms and glowing purple eyes illuminated by surrounding neon. The vehicle banks tightly around the monument, passing between it and the hotel building while the WET DREAM sign appears on the right. The space becomes increasingly enclosed as the vehicle navigates the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon commercial corridor with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering tight corridor between close skyscrapers with intense vertical neon signage
sharp turn between MARK 24 tower and adjacent building

agents.ego_description: weaving through narrow gaps between skyscrapers covered in holographic ads

entered.detail: green and white illuminated sign reading 'MARK 24'
cylindrical building wrapped in vertical purple neon strips
large floating digital advertisements displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: Flying through extremely tight corridors between skyscrapers, the vehicle passes the MARK 24 tower with its distinctive vertical purple neon strips on the right. Holographic billboards float on the left while the vehicle makes sharp turns to navigate the dense urban architecture. The environment is intensely lit by neon advertisements on all sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit bridge with sparse lighting

events.description: exiting dense neon district into darker elevated airspace with fewer buildings
ascending rapidly above the city skyline into darker airspace

agents.ego_description: ascending to higher altitude leaving the dense downtown neon district behind

entered.detail: elevated roadway structure with red illuminated edges stretching into distance
sparse twinkling lights of the far cityscape

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends rapidly out of the dense neon corridors into darker, more open airspace. The MARK 24 tower and holographic billboards fade into the distance as the vehicle approaches an elevated transit bridge with red lighting. The environment transitions from intense neon saturation to low-light conditions with only distant city lights visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that descends from an open highway into a claustrophobic neon canyon before ascending back into the dark city skyline. It begins with a stabilized cruise over a busy multi-lane highway, where the distant skyline is illuminated by neon billboards and the Militech Studios sign. As the vehicle descends sharply and banks left, the open roadway gives way to enclosed downtown architecture, passing the TENGU hotel sign as it approaches street level. The camera then weaves tightly around a massive cybernetic statue with glowing purple eyes and navigates narrow corridors between skyscrapers, passing the MARK 24 tower and floating holographic advertisements under intense neon saturation. Finally, the vehicle ascends rapidly out of the dense urban canyon, leaving the bright lights behind as it approaches a red-lit elevated transit bridge in the low-light airspace.
